rawAssistant: Before you head out into the misty dawn, make sure to check your lanterns one last time. That gale was fierce; it's a wonder any of them survived. You don't want to be stuck in the dark with nothing but twine and wick to keep you lit. Double-check each one, and consider making a new purchase if they're still not holding up. We can't have our travelers stumbling about in the dark, after all.
